hooks.command: curl -s -X POST ${PIASSISTANT_URL:-http://piassistant-mothership.local:8000}/api/hooks/event -H 'Content-Type: application/json' ${PIASSISTANT_API_KEY:+-H "Authorization: Bearer $PIASSISTANT_API_KEY"} -H 'X-Machine: MacMini' -d "$(cat /dev/stdin)" --connect-timeout 3 > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
